name: @tokenring/one
description: TokenRing One — local-first multi-agent AI workspace for coding, research, and automation

scripts.stage:frontend: bun run build:frontend && rm -rf frontend && mkdir -p frontend/one && cp -a ../../../frontend/one/dist/. frontend/one/
scripts.prepack: if [ ! -d frontend/one ] || [ -z "$(ls -A frontend/one 2>/dev/null)" ]; then bun run stage:frontend; fi
